title: Lighting fixture
abstract: A lighting fixture can include a first panel and a second panel. The lighting fixture can include a first set of LEDs positioned adjacent to a first edge of the first panel. The lighting fixture can further include a second set of LEDs positioned adjacent to a second edge of the second panel. The lighting fixture can include an illuminated surface positioned to receive light from at least one of the first panel and the second panel.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A lighting fixture defining a lateral direction, a transverse direction, and a vertical direction, the lighting fixture comprising: at least one panel; and at least one light source positioned adjacent an edge of the at least one panel to illuminate the at least one panel, wherein at least a portion of light emitted from the at least one light source exits the lighting fixture at a location that is different than the panel. 2. The lighting fixture of claim 1, wherein the at least one panel includes a first panel and a second panel spaced apart from the first panel along the lateral direction. 3. The lighting fixture of claim 2, further comprising an illuminated surface positioned to receive light from at least one of the first panel and the second panel. 4. The lighting fixture of claim 3, wherein the illuminated surface comprises a light reflector configured to reflect light from at least one of the first panel and the second panel. 5. The lighting fixture of claim 4, wherein at least a portion of the light reflector is positioned directly above a gap defined between the first panel and the second panel along the lateral direction. 6. The lighting fixture of claim 3, wherein the illuminated surface comprises an optic positioned to receive light exiting the first panel, and wherein the light the optic receives from the first panel exits the lighting fixture via the optic. 7. The lighting fixture of claim 6, wherein the light exits the first panel via a second edge of the first panel that is different than the edge illuminated by the at least one light source. 8. The lighting fixture of claim 6, wherein the optic is positioned to receive light exiting the second panel, and wherein the light the optic receives from the second panel exits the lighting fixture via the optic. 9. The lighting fixture of claim 8, wherein the optic comprises a total internal reflection (TIR) lens. 10. The lighting fixture of claim 1, wherein: the edge is a first edge; a first portion of the light emitted from the at least one light source exits the lighting fixture from a first surface of the at least one panel; a second portion of the light emitted from the at least one light source exits a second edge of the at least one panel; and the second portion of the light exits the lighting fixture at a location that is different than the first edge, the second edge, and the first surface of the least one panel. 11. The lighting fixture of claim 10, wherein the lighting fixture further comprises: at least one additional surface configured to redirect the second portion of the light from the second edge to the location that is different than the first edge, the second edge, and the first surface of the least one panel. 12. The lighting fixture of claim 11, wherein the lighting fixture further comprises: a mixing chamber defined, at least in part, by the at least one additional surface, the mixing chamber configured to redirect the second portion of the light exiting the second edge of the at least one panel; 13. The lighting fixture of claim 12, wherein the mixing chamber is concave relative to a first plane extending in the lateral direction and the longitudinal direction. 14. A lighting fixture comprising: a first panel including a plurality of surfaces and a first edge formed therebetween; a second panel including a plurality of surfaces and a second edge formed therebetween; a first set of one or more light emitting diodes (LEDs) positioned adjacent to the first edge to illuminate the first panel; a second set of one or more LEDs positioned adjacent to the second edge to illuminate the second panel; and an illuminated surface positioned to receive light from at least one of the first panel and the second panel. 15. The lighting fixture of claim 14, wherein the illuminated surface comprises a light reflector configured to reflect light from at least one of the first panel and the second panel. 16. The lighting fixture of claim 15, wherein the light reflector extends adjacent a first surface of the first panel and a second surface of the second panel. 17. A lighting fixture, comprising: a first panel including a plurality of surfaces and a first edge formed therebetween; a second panel including a plurality of surfaces and a second edge formed therebetween; a first set of one or more light emitting diodes (LED) positioned adjacent to the first edge to illuminate the first panel; a second set of one or more LED(s) positioned adjacent to the second edge to illuminate the second panel; a light reflector positioned to reflect light emitted from at least one of the first panel and the second panel; and a third panel positioned to receive light reflected off of the light reflector. 18. The lighting fixture of claim 17, wherein the third panel extends along the lateral direction at a height in the vertical direction that is below a highest point of the first panel and a highest point of the second panel. 19. The lighting fixture of claim 17, wherein: the first panel includes a first light guide; and the second panel includes a second light guide. 20. The lighting fixture of claim 18, wherein: the first light guide includes a receiving edge and an emitting edge, the receiving edge positioned adjacent the first set of one or more LEDs; and the second light guide includes a receiving edge and an emitting edge, the receiving edge of the second light guide positioned adjacent the second set of one or more LEDs.
